events.text: Goal!  USA 0, Portugal 1. Nani (Portugal) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box to the high centre of the goal.
Goal!  USA 1, Portugal 1. Jermaine Jones (USA) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom right corner    following a corner.
Jermaine Jones (USA) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  USA 2, Portugal 1. Clint Dempsey (USA) with an attempt from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Graham Zusi.
Goal!  USA 2, Portugal 2. Silvestre Varela (Portugal) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Cristiano Ronaldo with a cross   following a fast break.
